rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application & Application For Permission To Conduct Foreclosure Sale Of Real Property Located At 1378-1382 Alabama Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2021 line 1. OTHER HMC ASSETS, LLC, SOLELY AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE Notice Of Application & Application For Permission To Conduct Foreclosure Sale Of Real Property Located At 1378-1382 Alabama Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110 is GRANTED. The Court makes no determination as to the propriety and bona fides of the foreclosure proceedings under non-judicial foreclosure statutes. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BAYSIDE VILLAGES ASSOCIATES, L.P. VS. TRACY HUMPHREY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT TRACY HUMPHREY DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Compliant states a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on breach of lease. Any dispute regarding Defendant's compliance with lease, warning letters or notices is an issue of fact not properly addressed on a demurrer. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION, L.P. VS. LAKISHA BENJAMIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2021 line 6. DEFENDANT LAKISHA BENJAMIN, JACQUELINE RAMSAW DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile in good faith allegations in the complaint and supplemental complaint re: just cause eviction under CC 1946.2(b)(1) (See UD-101, paragraph 10 and UD-100, paragraph 8) and 30 Day Notice of Termination (no cause stated). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
